review.summary: The functional fixes look sound; the only concrete issue left is a missing SPDX header in the newly added test stub.

stages.A: The implementations match the stated fixes across audio, D-Bus, VNC, and test build logic, with no conceptual mismatch found.
stages.B: No concrete logic or control-flow bug was identified in the modified paths.
stages.C: Resource-lifecycle handling is improved overall, and no remaining leak or concurrency issue was confirmed from the diff.
stages.D: No guest-controlled security boundary regression or emulation correctness issue was found in this series.
stages.E: After deduplication and evidence filtering, one nit-level compliance issue remains: the new test source file lacks an SPDX identifier.

findings.title: New test source file is missing an SPDX license identifier
findings.description: Patch 6 adds a brand new C source file, but it starts directly with includes instead of the SPDX license line expected for new files in the QEMU tree. This is not a functional problem, but it is a concrete tree-policy violation and is already confirmed by checkpatch. The issue is triggered unconditionally whenever this file is added to the series.
findings.suggestion: Add the appropriate SPDX header at the top of tests/audio/modinfo-stub.c, matching the license used by neighboring test sources.
findings.confidence_reason: The file is newly created in the diff, the header is visibly absent, and checkpatch reports the same issue.

----------------------------------------------------------------
Various UI & audio fixes for 11.0-rc

----------------------------------------------------------------

Anton Kuchin (1):

GuoHan Zhao (2):

Marc-André Lureau (3):

  ui/vnc-jobs: fix VncRectEntry leak on job cleanup
  ui/vnc-jobs: clear source tag
